title: VIDEO detail page » NODES
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the VIDEO detail page to show all connected NODES
So I can ...
description:
* The VIDEO detail page contains a section with a list of all connected NODES.
* Each NODE in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each NODE in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each NODE in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no NODE connected to the VIDEO then the section is not displayed at all.
